title: Valkyrien § Create 6 (fabric)
description: A modpack with Create and Valkyrien Skies, including addons and new structures
body:
# Valkyrien § Create 6 (fabric)
A visually stunning and well-optimized modpack centered around Create and Valkyrien Skies. Explore diverse generated structures enhanced with Create elements like windmills and rotating machinery. Take to the skies or sail the seas with fully physical ships and airships powered by in-game physics. The modpack includes various addons expanding Create and Valkyrien Skies, allowing you to build flying machines, custom vehicles, and dynamic contraptions. You can also extract and refine oil to produce fuel for engines, enabling advanced mechanical builds. Whether you're into engineering, exploration, or sky piracy, this pack offers a rich and creative experience.
